def eligible_for_food_assistance(self) -> bool:
    # Check eligibility criteria
    if (self.age >= 18 and self.age <= 60) and \
       (self.race not in ['white', 'asian']) and \
       (self.employment_status in ['unemployed', 'retired']) and \
       (self.education in ['high school', 'college']) and \
       (self.marital_status in ['single', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']) and \
       (self.religion in ['islam', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']) and \
       (self.annual_income < 25000) and \
       (self.household_size <= 5):
        return True
    else:
        return False
